description: A dairy co-op has flagged a farmer's milk shipment for a high somatic cell count (SCC), indicating a potential herd health issue.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the individual SCC data for all cows from the last milking.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the SCC data for every cow in the herd.

nodes.task_description: Identify the top 10 cows with the highest SCC that are contributing most to the bulk tank average.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of the 10 problem cows.

nodes.task_description: Create a task for the farm manager to check the identified cows for mastitis and potentially divert their milk from the bulk tank.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates an actionable task to address the issue.
